overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street during golden hour. The player moves from a covered commercial arcade into an open urban thoroughfare with towering glass corporate buildings, holographic advertisements, and moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with red neon pillars

events.description: exits the covered arcade with red pillars into the open street area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian arcade passing red neon pillars and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV parked at the curb with brake lights illuminated
pedestrian in dark jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall cylindrical pillars with bright red neon lighting lining the arcade
futuristic black sport utility vehicle parked at the curb
large holographic advertising displays showing various commercial content
transparent overhead structure with shifting holographic projections
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered commercial arcade characterized by prominent red neon pillars. The camera moves forward past a parked black SUV on the left, with holographic billboards visible on the right. Around 7.5 seconds, the scene transitions from the sheltered arcade into a more open street area while maintaining the overhead canopy structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with holographic displays

events.description: futuristic sedan with glowing headlights passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk passing various storefronts and neon signage while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving along the street with headlights on
pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center divider of the street
elevated pedestrian bridge with traditional architectural elements spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open commercial street, the red neon pillars recede behind as the camera advances. The street features a mix of natural golden hour light from the left and artificial neon illumination. Palm trees line the center divider while holographic billboards and glass towers flank the sides. A pedestrian overpass becomes visible in the distance as vehicles occasionally pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: main avenue approaching intersection with overhead bridge

events.description: futuristic teal sports car with blue underglow speeds past on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue with increasing density of pedestrians near the upcoming intersection

notable_agents.action: teal sports car with prominent blue neon underglow speeding past the camera
pedestrian in bright red outfit walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive corporate skyscraper with vertical ribbed facade dominating the right side
tall vertical neon signage with red and yellow illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera advances along the main avenue as the pedestrian overpass looms closer ahead. The right side is dominated by a massive corporate tower with detailed architecture, while vibrant vertical neon signs line the left. Traffic increases with a distinctive teal sports car passing by, and the overhead holographic canopy continues to display shifting patterns above.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with pedestrian overpass and crosswalk markings

events.description: steps onto the intersection crosswalk with yellow grid markings
black sedan drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection toward the pedestrian overpass while navigating through crossing pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection crosswalk
pedestrian in green jacket and white hat crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: wide intersection with yellow grid pattern markings on the asphalt
short black and yellow striped bollards lining the curb edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches and enters the intersection dominated by the large pedestrian overpass ahead. The ground transitions to marked crosswalk patterns as the camera moves into the open intersection area. The overhead canopy ends, revealing more sky, while vehicles including a black sedan navigate the crossing. The corporate architecture continues on both sides with large digital advertisements visible on the right building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sheltered neon arcade into a wide, open urban intersection under a golden hour sky. It begins beneath a covered commercial walkway defined by red neon pillars and holographic billboards, gliding past a parked black SUV as the sheltered space gradually opens up. As the camera advances, the red pillars recede and the lighting shifts to a blend of natural gold and artificial neon, passing palm trees and glass towers toward a distant pedestrian overpass. The scene then expands along a main avenue where a teal sports car streaks past and a massive corporate tower looms on the right, all while a holographic canopy continues to shift overhead. Finally, the camera moves through the marked crosswalks of a busy intersection as the overhead canopy ends, fully revealing the sky and the surrounding digital advertisements of the corporate skyline.
